summary: Excellent audience recording of an epic Hartford show with blistering Alabama Getaway and a mind‑blowing Scarlet > Fire, captured in pristine quality.
review: The Jim Vita tape delivers crystal‑clear sound that lets listeners hear every nuance of the performance. Jeff highlights a first set that “kicks butt” and a legendary second set anchored by a scorching Scarlet > Fire, noting Jerry’s soaring solo peak. Overall the show is described as an epic, must‑hear experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review praises both the musical performance (epic, standout songs) and the recording quality (amazing), leading to a high rating but confidence is low due to limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer repeatedly praises Jim Vita's recording quality as amazing, indicating a clear, well‑balanced capture despite being an audience source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as “kicks butt”; second set labeled legendary and mind‑blowing, suggesting a strong, escalating flow.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Peak of his solo in Fire was highlighted as a standout moment.
